title: IngestionEvent
$comment: The `source.enum` array is generated from services/api/app/ingestion/config/sources/*.yaml by scripts/generate-ingestion-sources.cjs — edit the YAMLs, then run `pnpm run generate`. Do not hand-edit the enum.
description: One row per adapter fetch (outbox pattern). Immutable, append-only, replayable: re-deriving the catalog from these alone produces the same state. Vendor appeals reference bodySha256 to prove the source content at fetch time.

source.description: Closed enum of adapter sources. Stored VARCHAR+CHECK (not a native PG enum) so a new adapter does not need ALTER TYPE. Updated when a new source adapter ships.

sourceId.description: Stable per-source id (e.g. 'anthropics/skills/path/pdf' for github_skills; '@anthropic-ai/claude-skill-pdf' for npm; opaque cursor for MCP Registry).

httpStatus.description: 0 for webhook events (no HTTP fetch); 304 for cache-hit; 200 success; 4xx/5xx failures.

bodySha256.description: SHA-256 hex of the raw response body. For 304s, equals the cached body's hash.

etag.description: ETag (or Last-Modified) for the next-cycle conditional GET.

fromCache.description: true when Hishel served from cache (a 304 revalidation cost 0 wire bytes).

payload.description: Source-normalized item snapshot (bounded ~64 KiB per item; raw aggregator HTML is never persisted). null for 304s and bodyless webhook events.

appliedAt.description: Set when the merger applies this event to catalog_items. NULL = unapplied (retry candidate).

errorReason.description: When httpStatus indicates failure, the categorized reason.
